programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: An emergency room doctor is sued for malpractice after she ignored direct orders to save one near-death patient in favor of helping another who was also critically injured.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull and Benny mount a difficult federal trial defense for a young mother accused of aiding and abetting her extremist husband in an act of domestic terrorism; Benny's commitment to TAC complicates his burgeoning political career.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull heads to federal court for a client accused of stealing his own scientific research from the company he works for, a corporation he says buried his groundbreaking work because selling medication is more profitable than curing diseases.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull uses the First Amendment's freedom of speech to defend a controversial news commentator blamed for a man's suicide after she accused him on air of murder.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Izzy asks Bull to petition the court to have her best friend's body exhumed when the woman's son alleges she was murdered, despite her death already ruled accidental.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: Toby and the IIB must find the source of a deadly virus before it kills more people.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: Violent home invasions are being interrupted by a citizen dressed as a superhero.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: Oz puts his life in danger after asking Toby to help an old friend who witnessed a murder.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: On the Edge
programme.desc: When a young basketball player becomes entangled with drug dealers, he turns to an ex-cop and former private eye. Starring Ice-T, Gary Busey, Fred Williamson and Jim Brown.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: Facing unemployment and his girlfriend's rejection, writer Eddie Morra is sure that he has no future. That all changes when an old friend gives him a drug that produces enhanced mental acuity. Stoked on the untested chemical, Eddie rises to the top of the financial world and attracts the attention of a tycoon (Robert De Niro) who intends to use him to make a fortune. But terrible side-effects and a dwindling supply threaten to collapse Eddie's house of cards.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Terrorists seize the White House; ex-agent fights to save the President.

programme.title: Arlington Road
programme.desc: Man begins to suspect his neighbors are not what they appear to be and their secrets could be deadly

programme.title: Before the Devil Knows You're Dead
programme.desc: When two brothers organize the robbery of their parents' jewelry store the job goes horribly wrong, triggering a series of events that sends them, their father and one brother's wife barreling towards a shattering climax.

programme.title: Timecop
programme.desc: An officer for a security agency that regulates time travel, must fend for his life against a shady politician

programme.title: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Craig Sheffer and Brad Pitt star as two brothers who rebel against their stern father and become men in the majesty of the Montana wilderness.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Confronted with the injustices around them, four reluctant heroes form an unlikely alliance in order to rescue the town of Silverado from a nasty sheriff.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: After the fall of Tobruk in June 1942, U.S. Army sergeant Joe Gunn leads his tank into the Sahara desert.

programme.title: Dirty
programme.desc: Hard-edged story of a gangbanger turned cop who is forced to choose between his conscience and his loyalty to the code of blue all in the course of one day.

programme.title: The Guns Of Navarone
programme.desc: In this WWII spectacle, British intelligence learns that two enormous guns have been installed on the Aegean island of Navarone. The long-range field pieces are capable of destroying any British fleet trying to sail to Kheros, near Turkey, where a large British force is facing annihilation unless it is evacuated. It s the job of Captain Mallory and a handful of men to land secretly on Navarone and dismantle the guns.

programme.title: Berserk!
programme.desc: The sexy owner of a small traveling circus is under suspicion when the circus becomes plagued by a spate of murders.

programme.title: Fire Down Below
programme.desc: A pair of small-time smugglers have a falling out over the love of a sexy, and disreputable, woman.

programme.title: C.H.U.D.
programme.desc: Bizarre disappearances in NYC that point to something unsavory in the sewers.

programme.title: Black Christmas
programme.desc: During their Christmas break, a group of sorority girls are stalked by a stranger.

programme.title: The Rookies
programme.desc: Extreme sport lover Zhou Feng got involved in an international illegal trade by accident. So he had to follow an international special agent Bruce to Budapest.

programme.title: The Commitments
programme.desc: Jimmy Rabbitte, an unemployed Dublin boy, decides to put together a soul band made up entirely of the Irish working class.

programme.title: The Protege
programme.desc: A contract killer ventures out to avenge her mentor’s murder.

programme.title: Rogue
programme.desc: A mercenary and her team has rescued hostages from a gang of murderous rebels, and is trying to survive.

programme.title: American Sicario

programme.title: Arsenal
programme.desc: A successful businessman must rescue his deadbeat brother from the vicious mobster holding him hostage.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Space Ranger
programme.desc: The Space Ranger program, set up to protect humans from intergalactic threats in the future, is opened back up when a new threat arrives on Earth, threatening to destroy humanity once and for all.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: Karma: Death at Latigo Springs
programme.desc: Charley Stevens moves to the town where her recently deceased mother grew up; after arriving, she is plagued with strange nightmares that tease a horrific event, hinting at why her mother left town.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: The life story of Yip Man, the first person to teach the Chinese martial art of Wing Chun.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Master Ip, a new arrival in British-occupied Hong Kong, wants to open a martial arts academy to teach his unique Wing Chun style. A corrupt group of martial arts masters, led by Master Hung refuses to allow him to teach in peace until he proves himself as a kung fu master.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: Martial-arts master Ip Man (Donnie Yen) takes on a crooked developer (Mike Tyson) and his gang of brutal thugs.

programme.title: Ip Man 4: The Finale
programme.desc: Ip Man and his son encounter racial discrimination after traveling to the United States to seek a better life.

programme.title: Hit And Run
programme.desc: A lawyer is riding high after receiving a Not Guilty verdict for her client, but has to look over her shoulder when a woman she meets in a traffic accident is not all she appears to be.

programme.title: Out Of Reach
programme.desc: A woman struggles to cut ties between her family and her husband's powerful new friends before it's too late.

programme.title: Final Girl
programme.desc: A violent game of cat and mouse between a group of sadistic killers and a young woman trained in the ways of death.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: Tiffany and her frenemy compete over wedding bookings, despite her not having a real fiancé.

programme.title: With Love, Your Sweetly Salted
programme.desc: Critic Alison goes undercover at a restaurant she slated, but ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: Animal 2
programme.desc: James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) took the fall for the crimes of his older son (Vicellous Shannon) and is now serving a life term at Folsom Prison. When his younger son, James Jr. (K.C. Collins), is framed for murder, Allen refuses to let two men from the same family submit to life imprisonment for crimes they didn't commit. When he learns that James Jr. was set up by someone at the prison, he resolves to win his son's freedom. To do this, he must return to his violent brawler roots.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When dangerous street thug James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) is sent to prison, he continues his violent ways working for fellow inmate Kassada (Chazz Palminteri). This changes after Animal encounters Berwell (Jim Brown), a revolutionary who introduces him to the writings of Malcolm X. Animal reforms, realizing that murder and crime are destroying his community. After Animal is released, he goes home to find his son, Darius (Terrence Dashon Howard), involved in gang activity just like he was.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: You Made Me This Way
programme.desc: Haunted by a failed assassination attempt, ruthless drug lord Kwame becomes obsessed with Aubrey, the woman who nearly ended his life. Consumed by revenge, he kidnaps her, setting in motion a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Finders Keepers
programme.desc: Jaylin is a struggling single father trying to support his children and make ends meet. One day he comes upon a box of pills and tries to sell them for the cash. Until thugs approach him, and now a simple gamble, becomes life threatening.

programme.title: Gimme the Loot
programme.desc: Big Poppa and Ms. Wallace own and operate their own gentleman’s club, “Gimme the Loot” that’s funded by their criminal earnings. Their revenue is partly earned by their exotic dancers they recruit, who double as their crew to execute heists and bank robberies. But when the new crew finds themselves entangled in a high-stakes world of loyalty, secrets, and danger, their loyalties will be tested, and the crew have to decide if “The Loot” is really worth it.

programme.title: The Hanged Man
programme.desc: The astonishing true life story of Ron Van Clief, the first black martial arts movie star, known as “The Black Dragon”. His determination to win, despite horrific odds, exacts a heavy toll with spectacular highs and devastating lows.

programme.title: Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: In this captivating drama anthology, secrets unravel within eight unique stories. In a diverse world, characters from various walks of life confront hidden truths, connections, and sparking unexpected consequences. With each tale offering a glimpse into private lives, viewers are left questioning motives, trust, and morality.

programme.title: In Transit
programme.desc: In New York City, friends Leon and Rollo, live a fast life of drugs and women. From an unexpected mistake in their past, they owe a debt to a well-known drug kingpin. They soon find out the fast money is more than they bargained for, but leaving it behind, will prove to be even more challenging.

programme.title: Jurassic Domination
programme.desc: When two weaponized dinosaurs attack a small mountain town, it's up to the sheriff to stop them.

programme.title: The Twisters
programme.desc: Dozens of deadly tornadoes converge, merging into a mega twister set to obliterate the United States.

programme.title: The Exorcists
programme.desc: When his child is possessed by an unrelenting evil, a father hires three expert exorcists to purge the demon.

programme.title: Snakes on a Train
programme.desc: Under a Mayan Curse, snakes hatch inside a young woman on a train and devour the passengers aboard.

programme.title: The Young Cannibals
programme.desc: Seven friends accidentally summon a monster when they are tricked into eating human flesh.

programme.title: Heavy Trip
programme.desc: In this offbeat comedy from Finland, Turo is stuck in a small village where the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. The only problem? He and his bandmates have practiced for over a decade without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from Norwaythe promoter for a huge heavy metal music festivaland decide its now or never. They steal a van, a corpse, and even a new drummer in order to make their dreams a reality.

programme.title: The Beyond (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The seven dreaded gateways to hell are concealed in seven cursed places... And on the day the gates of hell are opened, the dead will walk the earth!From legendary Italian horror master Lucio Fulci come the ultimate classic of supernatural terror. A remote and cursed hotel, built over one of the seven gateways, becomes a yawning malevolent abyss that begins devouring both the bodies and the souls of all who enter in a graphic frenzy of gory crucifixions, chunkblowing chain-whippings, eyeball impalements, sulfuric acid meltdowns, flesh-eating tarantulas, throat-shredding demon dogs and ravenous bloodthirsty zombies. THE BEYOND is a towering achievement in hair-raising, mind-bending cinematic terror!

programme.title: The House By the Cemetery
programme.desc: A young family moves from their cramped New York City apartment to a spacious new home in New England. But this is no ordinary house in the country: the previous owner was the deranged Dr. Freudstein, whose monstrous human experiments have left a legacy of bloody mayhem. Now, someone - or something - is alive in the basement, and home sweet home is about to become a horrific hell on earth.

programme.title: Starry Eyes (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Determined to make it as an actress in Hollywood, Sarah Walker spends her days working a dead-end job, enduring petty friendships and going on countless casting calls in hopes of catching her big break. After a series of strange auditions, Sarah lands the leading role in a new film from a mysterious production company. But with this opportunity comes bizarre ramifications that will transform her both mentally and physically into something beautiful... and altogether terrifying. From the producer of Cheap Thrills and Jodorowskys Dune, Dennis Widmyer & Kevin Kolschs STARRY EYES is an occult tale of ambition, possession, and the true cost of fame.

programme.title: Beast from Haunted Cave
programme.desc: A giant spider stalks a band of thieves in this schlocky thriller from Gene Corman Productions. The story follows gangster Alexander Ward and his crew as they enlist the help of a local ski-instructor in the heist of several gold bars. But when they use explosives to create a distraction, they disturb the lair of a massive spider! Monte Hellman, the man behind such cult favorites as Two-Lane Blacktop, made his directorial debut with Beast From Haunted Cave. Trivia note: This movie debuted on a double bill with The Wasp Woman.

programme.title: The Strings
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, a musician travels to a remote cottage to work on new material, but soon finds herself under attack from a mysterious dark presence.

programme.title: The Midnight Man
programme.desc: It was supposed to be just an urban legend... Two teens unleash a demonic force who pits them against their greatest fears and dares them to survive his unholy game. Starring Robert Englund.

programme.title: The Queen of Black Magic (2019)
programme.desc: A middle-class family travels into rural Indonesia to visit the terminally ill director of the orphanage where the father was raised as a child. Sinister events soon befall them.

programme.title: The Nightshifter
programme.desc: Stênio works the graveyard shift in the morgue of a vast, violent city. Each night he prepares the lifeless corpses for examination, but he's never alone. For Stênio can talk to the dead...

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: The forces of nature tremble with an unseen evil in this chilling western tale of madness, paranoia and supernatural terror howling across the homestead.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's First Date" - Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro Goes to School" - Jed enrolls Jethro at an exclusive Beverly Hills elementary school. Millicent Schuyler-Potts, the proprietor of the school, is aghast when Jed and Jethro show up, convinced this is part of some ghastly hoax. After Jed says that banker Milburn Drysdale is his neighbor, she calls the banker. It turns out that Drysdale's bank holds the mortgage on the school. Schulyer-Potts suddenly warms to the charms of the Clampetts, even if it means accepting Jethro as a fifth grader.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

Miss Hathaway takes Jethro bowling and begins to show an interest in him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: James May visits Richard Hammond's workshop to get help!
programme.desc: Back in January, James May sought out The Smallest Cog to help with a special project of his – the restoration of a road bicycle. Mike follows the happenings of the day, including Richard, James, Neil and lots of filing of bike frames. If only James still had a classic car to restore...

programme.title: Richard Hammond VS Pro Golfer | Which is FASTER?
programme.desc: Richard Hammond has historically not been the biggest fan of golf through the years, so we've put him and the DriveTribe M5 Touring up against the biggest golf YouTuber in the world, Rick Shiels. Choosing the old Aintree F1 track as the battleground, can our 500+hp V10 estate car beat some golf bats and a small white ball? Trust us, this is a good one...

programme.title: Richard Hammond has bought back the car he regrets selling!
programme.desc: Richard Hammond owned numerous cars throughout the Top Gear era, and today we reunite him with one of his favourite cars from the good old days. We say reunite... He's only gone and bought it back!

programme.title: Some idiot crashed into Richard Hammond's pick-up truck
programme.desc: Someone crashed into Richard Hammond’s pick-up truck! Richard loves his Ford Ranger, his workhorse that he uses to commute to-and-from the Smallest Cog. But a few weeks ago, it was crashed into, ironically by one of Richard’s other cars from an upcoming Grand Tour special. Mike has decided to be a good samaritan and – while Richard was away on holiday – he set about fixing the boss’ truck.

programme.title: Richard Hammond broke our V10 BMW M5!
programme.desc: It only took Richard Hammond one lap in our BMW M5 Touring to break it! Mike takes the car back to Everything M to diagnose the result of Richard's drive in the V10 estate, and to get everything back spick and span!

programme.title: Is Richard Hammond a better farmer than Jeremy Clarkson?
programme.desc: Earlier this year, Richard ventured back to his home-from-home in the Lake District to have a catch-up with his best friend, who happens to be a farmer. Can Richard hack it when it comes to farming life? All we can say is he's not afraid to give it a go!

programme.title: Why are V10 engines completely gone from modern cars?
programme.desc: The V10 engine is all but gone from the car industry, but with the V8 and V12 still going strong, why has the V10 died? Mike Fernie takes the DriveTribe M5 Touring for a spin to investigate this mystery.

programme.title: Richard Hammond needs your help – NEW TV SHOW IDEA!
programme.desc: Welcome to something a bit different on DriveTribe – a new TV show pilot! We have worked really hard on this one to make it arguably the biggest project we've ever filmed for the channel! Richard Hammond hates these two cars, so let him explain how he plans to 'cull the herd' and move the car industry in the right direction.

programme.title: The Stig rips the new BMW M3 Touring around the Nürburgring GP! | EXCLUSIVE FIRST DRIVE
programme.desc: When the BMW M division invites you to test the new G81 M3 Touring at the Nürburgring GP, there's only one thing for it – you send the Stig in! In this video, Ben Collins explores the limits of the first estate M car since the 2007 M5 Touring.

programme.title: Fixing Richard Hammond's Top Gear-era Jaguar | Project Jaaaag Ep.2
programme.desc: Richard Hammond's new Jaguar XJR is back at his workshop The Smallest Cog for a refresh. However all is not as it first seems with the car...

programme.title: We bought a cheap supercharged V8 Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Pt.1
programme.desc: A new project car is born! With Richard's Jaguar XJR not needing much done to it, Mike has bought the tattiest XKR he could find to restore and take on Hammond's car. Who will end up with the nicest supercharged Jag? Welcome to Project Jaaaag!

programme.title: V10 BMW M5 Touring Manual lap of the Nürburgring!
programme.desc: After taking our manual V10 estate to the Isle of Man for its first drive, Mike decided there was only one place to take it for one of its last drives on the DriveTribe channel. Mike straps in for a lap with Misha Charoudin – the YouTube King of the 'Ring – to experience the greatest circuit in the world in the M5.

programme.title: Oliver the Opel has been restored at Richard Hammond's workshop!
programme.desc: Did you know that Oliver has been the wrong colour for the past decade or so? After a slightly rushed restoration back in the day, Richard handed Oliver over to the Smallest Cog to get it back to 'Africa spec', and in this video Mike goes for a walkaround with Neil Greenhouse to see how Oliver is doing.

programme.title: Rescuing Richard Hammond's Subaru Impreza from the secret Grand Tour compound!
programme.desc: Where do the cars from The Grand Tour go after a special has been filmed? Well, Mike Fernie takes a trip to the secret compound that the cars are kept at to rescue Richard Hammond's WRX STI Impreza and get it back to Hereford.

programme.title: Richard Hammond drives our manual V10 BMW estate for the last time!
programme.desc: The time has come – we are selling the DriveTribe BMW M5 Touring! It has run its course on the channel, mostly at 8,000rpm, and now it is time to move it on to a new lucky owner. But before then, Richard Hammond grabbed the keys for one last blast in Wales.

programme.title: Driving The Last Car Richard Hammond Drove On Top Gear!
programme.desc: This MGB was the final car Richard Hammond ever got behind the wheel of on Top Gear. Now, he and the Smallest Cogs have turned it into a racecar, which Mike Fernie has been given the job of testing around the epic Llandow race circuit!

programme.title: We manual-swapped our cheap supercharged Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Ep.3
programme.desc: In this episode of Project Jaaaag, the Japanese XKR grows three pedals and a gearstick!

programme.title: How is Richard Hammond's classic car business doing after 2 years?
programme.desc: With 2023 coming to a close, Mike Fernie grabs Chief Cog Neil Greenhouse for a walkaround of Richard Hammond's workshop to discuss the cars inside and how the business is doing after its second year in business.

programme.title: Fixing our cheap supercharged V8 Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Ep.4
programme.desc: Project Jaaaag continues with fixing everything that has gone wrong on our XKR's V8 engine. From gaskets to timing chain tensioners, Mike and the Swallows team make sure to seal up the engine and rescue some of the horsepower lost over the years.

programme.title: We (nearly) finished Richard Hammond's Top Gear-era Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Ep.5
programme.desc: Richard Hammond's Top Gear era Jaguar build is coming to a close, but not quite!

programme.title: Fixing our cheap supercharged V8 Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Ep.6
programme.desc: Project Jaaaag reaches its next stage, with this video's aim being to completely refresh the front subframe, making the underside of the car spotless before sorting everything on top! Oh, and Mike sits in a 2002 F1 car!

programme.title: Richard Hammond's entire year has come down to THIS
programme.desc: Having built and tested the Smallest Cog MGB, it's finally time to set it loose on track at the mighty Silverstone circuit. With Abbie Eaton and Anthony Greenhouse behind the wheel and Richard managing the team from the pits, can they get a result on the car's first proper outing?

programme.title: A walkaround of EVERYTHING in the DriveTribe car collection!
programme.desc: Take a look at everything that currently resides in the DriveTribe stable!

programme.title: Fixing our cheap supercharged V8 Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Ep.7
programme.desc: Project Jaaaag continues with another pivotal part being made and installed into the XKR – a stunning exhaust system that will see the 4.0-litre V8 breathe at its best. Along with a fresh rear subframe, this Jag is starting to really come together...

programme.title: Richard Hammond REACTS to all his crashes
programme.desc: It's been a running joke that Richard Hammond has had quite a few crashes over the years. We sat him down to watch a crash compilation and even he was surprised by how many there have been.

programme.title: Rescuing over 160bhp from our cheap supercharged Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Ep.8
programme.desc: As we near the end of Project Jaaaag, it's time to get the car back on the dyno. Let's hope it goes better than the last time...

programme.title: Richard Hammond welcomes Shmee's legendary Clio V6 to The Smallest Cog!
programme.desc: You guys enjoyed our Cog Score videos to last year with Mat Armstrong and Jimmy Broadbent, so we're kick-starting this year with a true legend of car YouTube – Shmee150! He has brought his recently refreshed Clio V6 to The Smallest Cog for Mike and Anthony to critique, while Tim and Richard chat about the world that they're both in.

programme.title: Stomping Grounds
programme.desc: In Stomping Grounds Episode 5, our crew follows the road all the way down to where it ends on the tropical sun-baked island of Key West at the southern tip of the Florida Keys. Surrounded by water, Key West is a boater's paradise with historic seaports and marinas offering a bustling waterfront with historic schooners, dive boats, sport fishing charters, parasailing adventures and scenic coastal excursions. Host Ryan McVinney hops aboard a custom hybrid diesel-electric power catamaran with solar panels, called "Squid" for an in-depth eco-tour of Key West National Wildlife Refuge, including snorkeling in a sponge garden with tropical fish. Next a quick stop in Dry Tortugas National Park via the 110-foot Gladding Hearn power catamaran the "Yankee Freedom III" to visit historic Fort Jefferson, then we jump on a 2020 Sea Hunt 255 Ultra for a ride through the dolphin playground to a secret local boating spot known as Snipe Keys with pristine white sandbars. Back in town we we board the Nau Santa Maria - a replica of Christopher Columbus' sailboat. Finally we head 50 miles offshore to ply the wakes of the shrimp boats with fishing charter captain Chris Trosset aboard his Contender 35ST center console boat.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave reconnects with a friend he hasn't seen in years, author of the newly released book Smart Mouth and founder of RAMONA beverages, Jordan Salcito. The duo discusses the best wines in the world, the trick to blind tasting, and why Dave might just have to move to France. Dave answers a new Ask Dave about when to splurge on a restaurant, and prepares a braised oxtail dish in response to a previous Ask Dave.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave talks to multi-hyphenate political advisor, author, and, of course, chef Sam Kass. They talk about how he found his way into cooking at the White House for the Obama family, the dangers of our current food consumption, and what changes consumers and our government can, and have to, make in order to keep our favorite foods and food systems alive. After the interview, Dave answers an Ask Dave on homemade condiments before finishing part 2 of his ramen cooking, creating the broths and tares, and bringing it all together with the noodles from the cooking segment in Ruby Tandoh's episode. He serves his completed, and delicious, ramen to some special guests.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Ciudad Juárez, Pati joins in with a group of Pachuco dancers, who are passionately preserving this distinctive Prohibition-era culture's traditions. Together they head to the iconic Kentucky Bar, rumored to be the birthplace of the margarita. Later, she savors an icon of Juárez's food scene, the burrito, at Burritos El Compa where the Olivares are keeping their family legacy alive.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: For the indigenous Rarámuri people, long-distance running through Chihuahua's majestic Copper Canyon is a way of life. Pati meets the Moreno brothers, who are famous for winning ultramarathons. In Huetosachi, community leader María Monarca teaches Pati about the art of cooking with corn in Rarámuri cuisine, from nixtamalization to a traditional dish known as "chacales."

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Chihuahua's capital, Chihuahua City, Pati meets the first member of the Rarámuri people to become a world-famous pianist, Romeyno Gutiérrez, who teaches her the basics of Rarámuri music before taking her to his favorite barbacoa spot. Pati's also invited into the home of Chef Ana Rosa Beltrán del Río to cook a few ancient Chihuahuan recipes and learn the art of drying chiles.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati journeys to Casas Grandes to experience the preserved foods, or "conservas," that sustained people during the Mexican Revolution. She meets a family that has lived for generations at Hacienda de San Diego, Mexico's "White House" for a day after the battle of Casas Grandes, including Diana Acosta and her mother, Sara Ramírez, who still preserves food the way they did during the war.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati saddles up for an exhilarating ride into the heart of Chihuahua's ranch and rodeo life. She gets a lesson in roping and riding from rodeo champion Ricardo "Bubba" Nevárez and his friends, then is invited to a post practice carne asada. She also meets Chihuahua's most influential cattle rancher, Álvaro Bustillos, at his Rancho El Arroyo, where the ranch cook serves up some cowboy delicacies.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Casas Grandes, Pati rides in style with local art curator Mayte Luján in her 1960s Cadillac. Mayte owns a bed and breakfast, Las Guacamayas, where she invites Pati into the kitchen to make chile con queso in impossibly soft flour tortillas. Later, Pati learns about another tasty export from Chihuahua, pecans, at Gustavo Vázquez's farm, where his family has been growing them for generations.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores the culture of mysterious Mennonites, a religious community who came to Chihuahua from Germany. Mostly, she's after what they're best known for around Mexico, their cheese! She sees their traditional cheese-making process at Pampas Cheese Factory, the holder of the Guinness World Record for largest Mennonite cheese. Then she tries another local culinary innovation, Mennonite pizza.

A series of mishaps unexpectedly lands Tom in prison -- and Frenchie, having fallen in love with him, is left on her own to sort out the mess.

programme.title: Moolissa The Underwater Cow - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny’s class finds out they have a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolisa! Being from land, it can be tricky for Moolisa to do everything that Finny’s friends do in the sea, but Moolisa will try her best to share in all the experiences of life in the ocean.

programme.title: Five Little Monsters Jumping On The Bed - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a silly and slightly spooky version of the classic kids’ rhyme, Five Little Monkeys, with monsters instead of monkeys. It’s a great song for practicing counting down from five, and for teaching little monsters (and children!) not to jump on the bed.

programme.title: Red Light Green Light - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Tobee learned all about traffic safety in school today! He learned how to walk in a crosswalk, to look both ways before crossing a street, and what the colors of a traffic light mean. That reminds Caitie of a song about stopping and going called “Red Light, Green Light.” Together, they sing and dance, stopping and starting again and again. Tobee and Caitie have a blast, and you can join the fun, too! Green light!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a special child minder wrist link to Yeojun, a young Korean boy, so he can look after his younger brother Yeowoon as they follow their dad to a big TV studio on 'take your kids to work day'. Jett and Jett Pet are called to Pilsen, in the Czech Republic to deliver a marionette for the town's Historical Weekend Festival. But Golden Boy ends up getting caught in a giant Golem puppet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers some special movie making equipment to a boy named Riley who's visiting an alien themed festival in Argentina. Golden Boy winds up telling Riley that he's a real alien. Jett delivers a white dress to a girl named Bhanu in Varanasi, India to wear to a birthday party. But they discover it's the Holi Festival that day. Jett offers to escort Bhanu to help keep her white dress clean.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet are called to Dunedin, New Zealand, to help a boy and his new friend collect a trailer's worth of furniture that's rolled down the world's steepest street! Jett delivers a robotic Piggy Bank to a boy, Lorenzo, in Rome, Italy. The bank (Piggy B) can smell coins and put them in its own slot. Trouble occurs when Piggy B tries to collect every coin in the Trevi Fountain.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet go to Zhangjiajie, China to help a boy bring a gift to a legendary dragon so he can make a wish. Golden Boy steals the boy's gift for the dragon so he can use it to make his own wish. Jett delivers a wool hat and gloves to a girl, Trisha, in St. John's, Newfoundland, Canada. She's been hoping for snow, but there hasn't been a cloud in the sky for awhile.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet deliver special envelopes that can go underwater to a girl named Chay. She lives in Vanuatu and wants to invite all her friends to her birthday party on the beach. Jett brings Jimbo's Mom to World Aircraft for a Mother's Day visit and then sets off to deliver a package of flowers to a girl named Grace in Australia. On the way, he is intercepted by Golden Boy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy living in Austria named Lukas asks Jett to deliver a wagon that is big enough to carry a large aquarium so he can take his pet catfish with him to the local water park. But the fish is mistaken for a shark! Jett delivers a toy to a boy for his pet hamster - a wheel for it to run in that lights up and plays music. The hamster accidentally runs through a device that makes it huge.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl named Selena in Uruguay has lost her first tooth. She's going to put it in a special tooth box that Jett delivers and it's going to go under her pillow for Perez the Mouse. A young boy living in Finland named Petrie asks Jett to deliver a heavy metal wig for his Dad. Petrie wants his dad to perform as a surprise. But the wig flies off and causes a blackout at the concert venue.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Toronto, Canada to deliver a knapsack to Kamili, but it turns out the bag isn't for him. It's for his cousin Amon in Tanzania. Kamili's internet friends around the world want to contribute too. Jett delivers an incubator to a girl named Nambayar in Mongolia who has found a big egg. The egg hatches into a baby dinosaur! Jett uses a time machine to try and find the baby's mom.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers an incubator to a girl named Nambayar in Mongolia who has found a big egg. The egg hatches into a baby dinosaur! Jett uses a time machine to try and find the baby's mom. While playing at World Aircraft, the Super Pets accidentally damage a new satellite dish. Jett delivers a robot puppy to a little girl named Lien in Singapore. But Lien wanted a real puppy, not a robot.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy named Victor orders a "Travel The World" holographic board game from the Super Wings. When Golden Boy decides to play, and win at any cost. Jett delivers a cardboard playhouse kit to twin sisters, Fatima and Peri in Baku, Azerbaijan. Trouble arises when the competitive sisters try to put all their toys in the playhouse and it rips open.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet deliver special farmer's outfit to a girl named Greta who lives in Germany. Greta is very excited to make friends with the animals on her grandfather's farm but the animals escape their enclosure. Jett delivers some mini camper vans to Princess Maribelle in England. Maribelle wants to take her puppies with her on a camping trip. But the group is chased by a bear in the woods.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a firefighter's suit to a girl named Lydia whose Mom is a firefighter in the Amazon Rainforest. When a real fire emergency happens, the Super Wings and Lydia must upgrade into World Guardian mode to save the rainforest and its animals. Jett flies to Moscow, Russia and delivers a special steamer to a girl named Sasha. She wants to use the steamer to make pelmeni, a Russian dumpling.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy named Joy lives in Kenya. Some wild animals from the national park escaped and they are making mayhem in the village! A boy and his Dad in Gwangju Korea need to get a giant watermelon they've grown on their farm in the mountains to a contest in town. Jett delivers a giant slide to help, but the watermelon bounces out of the slide and causes a calamity, knocking over some rare rocks.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: As a tornado bears down on Turkey's Iztuzu Beach, Sevgi wants to bury sand nest for the endangered Loggerhead turtle eggs and save them from the wind. So Jett delivers her a set of digging tools. Jett flies to Sainte-Marguerite Island and delivers an inflatable boat to a boy named Emile. Emile needs the boat to bring a giant robot statue that he made out of lemons to be a float in a parade.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When Grand Albert loses his camera that has the ability to make things bigger or smaller it's found by a girl in Egypt who is babysitting her baby brother. The camera turns him into a giant baby. A boy, Henri, is given a riding toy truck by his goofball Dad. When it gets dirt, Jett brings a Car Wash Kit to them and together they wash all the dirty cars/trucks in town.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett is excited as he is ready to go on his 300th mission and if he is successful, he will go into the SW Hall of Fame and become a Legendary Super Wing. Jett has to control the fallout from Golden Boy's interference which has lead to the release of a 'dinosaur' from an iceberg in Greenland. The dinosaur takes off with Eric, a local boy that Jett had come to Greenland to help.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Laerke wants to tune-up an old steam locomotive so he can join his friends at the Danish Railway Museum. Jett delivers a train repair kit. Niphavanh needs a large flower basket for That Luang, the biggest festival in Laos. There, Niphavanh will circle the Pha That Luang monument and make a wish: to visit outer space! Jett delivers, as always, but complications arise when Golden Boy appears.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Finnley, winner of the "One Day Delivery Experience" comes to World Aircraft to go on a delivery with Jett! The delivery takes them to Shanghai, China, where a girl named Yenching needs an action camera to film a cooking video. While Astra is working at her space station, Golden Boy learns that all delivery orders are patched through her satellite. He and Golden Wheels take over the station.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Helen needs a torch pod for the opening torch relay ceremony of the International Children’s Games. She needs the Super Wings to perform the torch relay! When her elephant sanctuary floods in Chiang Mai, Thailand, Kulap orders elephant-sized life jackets and water wings so she can guide the elephants to safety. A baby white elephant is separated from the group and carried away by water currents.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Three Little Pigs & More Kids Stories - Super Supremes
programme.desc: This fun collection of nursery rhymes features stories starring the superhero family The Super Supremes!

programme.title: Five Little Ducks Nursery Rhymes & Kids Songs - Boom Buddies
programme.desc: Five Little Duck, Bingo The Dog, Incy Wincy Spider and many more Boom Buddies rhymes! Happy singing!

programme.title: Nursery Rhymes for Children + More Kids Song - Jelly Bears
programme.desc: Join Jelly Bears as they dance to preschool rhymes like Five Little Teddy Bears, Johny Johny and more!

programme.title: Jingle Bell & Christmas Carols for Kids - Kids TV
programme.desc: Get into the Christmas holiday spirit with our favourite Christmas songs like Jingle Bells, We Wish You a Merry Christmas, 12 Days of Christmas, Deck the Halls and more Christmas carols for kids.

programme.title: Booya Non-Stop
programme.desc: Follow the hilarious adventures of five adorable kooky monsters who live under a kid's bed. Living under the bed is easy and kind of safe but these adorable characters are impulsive, curious, and always ready for fun adventures. With a playful dog who is bent on messing up their plans, the group keeps venturing out, finding ways to dodge the snoopy sniffy, creating chaos and laughter around them.

programme.title: Baby Shark + More Baby Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Let's groove to the Baby Shark Song !! Kids songs and nursery rhymes that the little ones will love. Come join Farmees as they sing along and dance to these kids rhymes like animal sound song, ten in the bed, five little ducks, Incy wincy spider, five little speckled frogs, humpty dumpty, jack and jill, rig a jig jig, miss polly had a dolly, the muffin man, phonics song and many more baby songs.

programme.title: Wash Your Hands & Healthy Habits Song - Super Supremes
programme.desc: Join your favorite nursery rhymes characters, Super Supremes on their fun adventures of learning. Learn to wash your hands and sing along with this healthy habits song and more popular baby songs like Soccer Song, Bath Time Song, Swimming Song, Yes Yes Song, Boo Boo Song, Please and Thank You, Zoo Song, Growing Up Song, Finger Family, Three Little Kittens and many more kids rhymes.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails befriend a pair of aliens who crash land their spaceship on Mobius. Sonic has to avoid Robotnik's ULTRA-GRAVITIZER (sort of a hedgehog flypaper) to help fix their ship and blast-off back home.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Tails gets trapped in the "Warp of Confusion" (an Escher-like world of another dimension) by Robotnik's cousin, Dr. Warpnik, Sonic comes to the rescue and traps Robotnik and his badniks in the warp.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: It's that time of year when the berries are about to burst into bloom - and it looks like this is going to be a bumper crop! Strawberry decides to celebrate the event with a first-ever Berry Big Berry Blossom Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's a retelling of "Sleeping Beauty" - but our focus is on the fairy that didn't get her invitation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: This is the story of "Rapunzel", but with a twist. Princess Rapunzel (Rainbow Sherbet) has always preferred being called Rap and liked doing things her way.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland. Unfortunately, she's become a bit of a diva in the process, and her self-centered behavior is about to cut her career short.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: The Bears host a family reunion. Brother and Sister accidentally let cows loose!

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: The Bear Family find mementos in the attic. The cubs learn their friends are moving away.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Sister adopts a chipmunk. Mama teaches Sister the 'Star light, star bright' principle.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Papa wants to remove an old tree stump. Then, Brother joins an art class.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: The Bear Family visits the mall. Sister has to decide what to write about for a project.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Brother and Sister adopt a puppy. Brother and Sister damage Ms. Grizzle’s flowerbed.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: The Bear Family gets new neighbors. Then, Papa Bear decides to run for Mayor himself!

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Mama and Papa do a dance demonstration. Brother and Sister love the Space Grizzlies show.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: James gets a new coat of paint, the engines enter a competition and Thomas receives help.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Percy runs away, Spencer comes to the island and Thomas gets snowed in.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: The engines keep a secret, James collects the Queen of Sodor and Emily gets a new route.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas and James collect fireworks, Fergus works in the quarry and Gordon helps Percy.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas and Percy compete, Elizabeth collects Christmas puddings and Edward races Spencer.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Gordon develops a squeak, Percy’s track is wobbly and Thomas collects the circus.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas transports eggs, Henry doesn’t feel well and Emily pulls Gordon’s express.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After the kids judge a spider by its creepy looks, Barney tells them the story of The Reluctant Dragon where a shepherd became friends with a dragon, who was judged by her appearance.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's friend Monty the butterfly passes through the park with a flock of friends on their way to Mexico. When Monty gets left behind, Barney takes everyone on a visit to Mexico to return Monty to his insect friends and family and give Baby Bop the chance to say goodbye to her butterfly friend.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby sister from China; however, Rusty's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China. Barney shows Rusty and the others some info China on the computer and BJ and Baby Bop talk about siblings. Through Barney's Travel Book, Barney takes Rusty, BJ and Baby Bop on an adventure to China where he can learn more about his new sister's heritage. When they get there, the people are celebrating Chinese New Year. From lion dances and talented performers to tasty treats, making lanterns and puppet shows, the celebration never runs out of fun. By the time he returns to the park, Rusty excitedly meets his new baby sister, named Mei Ling, and realizes he will be the best big brother ever.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Ben is late to the park and is disappointed to realize he missed his chance at riding a real pony. He has waited his whole life for this, and now it looks as if hes missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes Ben to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse with Riff and Baby Bop. Ben and Barney return to the park just in time for him to ride the pony after all! Ben is thrilled to ride a horse and learned an important lesson about patience and waiting.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Emma is stuck with a school project and can't play soccer with Joshua. Having to interview her parents and get info about an interesting ancestor, she is frustrated with the assignment. Barney helps her discover that her ancestors were from Venice, Italy. Using his Travel Book, Barney takes Joshua, Emma, and Riff to Venice, Italy. He gives his friends a gondola ride as well as telling them about famous explorer Marco Polo. Barney's friend, Anna Maria tells Emma that she knew her great grandfather and takes her to his shop, where they try on masks and make some of their own. Emma learns that if she makes the mask in parts, she'll get it done. Barney reminds her of this lesson, so she will do the same for her school project.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop, and BJ are helping the kids get ready for a school play. Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece. Of course, the little dinos and kids want to visit the country, so off they go! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre. Barney knows a great story that originated in Greece called King Midas. By the end of the day, everyone has learned that wanting too much is not a good thing, especially BJ!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Ben accidentally includes Kioko's prized music box from Switzerland in a cardboard box of yard sale items-the music box is sold! Kioko is sad and Ben wants to make things right, so he and Barney travel to Switzerland in search of a replacement gift. While there, they sample Swiss food, customs and games-but no music box! Luckily when Ben returns the music box is returned!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Its a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. The weather becomes an exciting opportunity for the kids to learn all about the season of Spring and discuss all the fun activities they can partake in this season. This includes flying a kite, riding a bike, and enjoying the rainbows in the sky.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After feeling tired of being told to be careful, BJ learns that saying be careful is a way of showing love and concern. This important lesson prompts Barney to teach his friends essential safety rules. Spending time with Barney is always enjoyable, but it's also crucial to learn how to play it safe to stay protected and happy!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends begin the day by playing hopscotchwith a twist. They discover that making a triangle requires 3 lines and 3 corners, which sparks their excitement to explore more shapes. To have even more triangle fun, Barney takes them on a camping trip where they get to explore and learn about different shapes in the world around them.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Its the day of the bike parade, but Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Mr. Boyd works quickly to help fix Nick's bike in time for the parade. While waiting, Barney takes the opportunity to teach his friends all about bike safety, making sure they're ready to ride safely and have a great time in the parade!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After the kids discuss their desire for a special day, Beth creates Happy Day, a special holiday in which each friend makes a wish and the others try to make it come true. When Beth hurts herself, BJ learns the importance of doing good deeds for others.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney plans a magical picnic for his friends and their families to spend quality time together and create lasting memories. Each kid has brought a family treasure to show Barney, which they all excitedly spend time sharing with one another.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The kids gather at the park, talking about how hot it is and wondering what to do on such a day. Thanks to Barney's brilliant idea, what starts as a too hot afternoon turns into a totally cool day as he introduces them to the wonders of water. Excitedly, they all team up to find creative ways to stay cool and have a splashing good time together!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Even though the park feels like a second home for Barney and his friends, BJ dreams of building his very own totally awesome, completely cool house. While they eagerly wait to see it, they start talking about the different rooms a house can have. However, when BJ forgets to include a space for Baby Bop in his plans, Barney reminds him that family is what truly makes a house feel like a home.
